title: 2015 Apps vs 2026 Apps
setting: Split visual concept: left half cold blue desaturated 2015 aesthetic, right half dark premium 2026 with violet and coral accents, consistent split-screen camera framing, dramatic contrast lighting

scenes.prompt: Old cracked smartphone with basic ugly calorie counter app interface, dusty desk, harsh fluorescent lighting, desaturated colors, intentionally dated look, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: This is what calorie tracking looked like in 2015.

scenes.prompt: Person tediously typing food name letter by letter on old phone interface, bored expression, cold blue office lighting, slow and painful process visualization, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Search every food. Scroll through hundreds of results. Guess your portions. Hope it's close enough.

scenes.prompt: Modern premium smartphone floating in dark space showing sleek AI-powered nutrition app with glowing violet interface, holographic food scan animation, particles, futuristic, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Now this is 2026. One photo. AI does everything.

scenes.prompt: Montage of futuristic app features: AI food scanning with glowing lines, adaptive macro recommendations with animated charts, weekly coach insights, all in dark premium aesthetic with violet and coral accents, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: AI coach that adapts weekly. Photo scanning in 3 seconds. Five goal modes. Everything in one app.

scenes.prompt: Person confidently using modern dark-themed nutrition app, satisfied smile, warm premium lighting with coral and violet accents, lifestyle shot, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Stop living in 2015. Upgrade to Cals2Gains. Free for 7 days.
